dc_description_s: This data represents addresses for Lincoln County, Wisconsin in 2026. [The Address Point feature class provides the authoritative source for addresses in Lincoln County. Address data supports 911 emergency response, geocoding services like NG911, permitting, and other government or organizational functions requiring accurate and standardized address information. Data is maintained by Lincoln County Land Information staff and updated on an ongoing basis as new addresses are assigned or existing ones are modified.]
uw_supplemental_s: This is an archived copy of the data held at UW-Madison.
